title: patania elwesii
intro: Patania elwesii, also known as Patania, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Malvaceae. The plant is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Patania elwesii has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, and is believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being.
